name: remilia-oversight
description: Monitor risky tool usage from the Remilia seat with Codex hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Watch risky tool usage and emit oversight messages
interface.longDescription: Provides PostToolUse hook templates for risky tools and a PowerShell checker that emits concise oversight messages in owner / remilia_action / reason / next_actor format.
defaultPrompt: Monitor risky tool usage from the Remilia seat
